title: Schwartzia brasiliensis
taxonomy: Schwartzia brasiliensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Schwartzia, which consists of tropical species found in Central and South America. The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes over 4,600 species. The classification of Schwartzia brasiliensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Gentianales, Family: Apocynaceae, Genus: Schwartzia, Species: S. brasiliensis. This plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
